user.title: Paddle Conditions
user.description:
Paddle Conditions scores your favorite paddle spots using wind, air quality, temperature, UV, visibility, and precipitation data. Each spot gets a Go, Caution, or No-go rating.

After setup, you'll add one or more paddle locations. For each location you'll need:
- **Coordinates** (latitude and longitude)
- **Water body type** (lake, river, or bay/ocean)
- **USGS station ID** (optional, for river flow data)
- **NOAA station ID** (optional, for water temperature)

All weather and air quality data is fetched automatically from free public APIs.

user.title: Add Paddle Location
user.description: Pick a preset location to start with pre-filled coordinates and station IDs, or choose "Custom location" to enter everything yourself.

data_description.preset: Preset locations include coordinates and USGS station IDs where available

location.title: Location Details
location.description: Confirm or edit the details for this paddle spot. After adding, you'll see sensors for paddle score, wind, temperature, UV, AQI, and more.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this spot, e.g. "Lake Natoma" or "Deschutes River"
data_description.latitude: Decimal degrees, e.g. 38.6360. Tip: find coordinates on Google Maps by right-clicking a location.
data_description.water_body_type: Determines which data sources and scoring factors apply
data_description.display_order: Lower numbers appear first when you have multiple locations (0 = default)
data_description.usgs_station_id: For river streamflow data. Find your station at waterdata.usgs.gov
data_description.noaa_station_id: For water temperature data. Find your station at tidesandcurrents.noaa.gov
data_description.optimal_cfs: Your preferred river flow in cubic feet per second. Only used for river locations.

init.title: Paddle Conditions Options
init.description: Customize how conditions are scored. Choose your activity and profile to start with recommended weights, then fine-tune individual factors. Weights are automatically normalized to 100%.

data_description.activity: Switch between paddle boarding and kayaking. Each has its own scoring profiles
data_description.profile: Preset weight configurations tuned for different paddling styles
data_description.update_interval: How often to refresh weather and condition data from APIs
